# Cascading split — before. Order m=3.
#
# Internal node b is already full (2 keys). Inserting 28 overflows leaf e,
# promoting 28 into b; b then overflows too and splits, promoting 28 again
# into the root. Exercises the recursive split() path (>1 level).
#
#                       [50]                        a (root)
#                     /      \
#               [20,35]       [70]                  b        c
#              /   |   \      /   \
#       [10,15] [25,30] [38,40] [60] [80]           d   e   f   g  h
root 1
1  1  2  50 3
2  2  4  20 5  35 6
3  1  7  70 8
4  2  0  10 0  15 0
5  2  0  25 0  30 0
6  2  0  38 0  40 0
7  1  0  60 0
8  1  0  80 0
